spell.spellbladenext.magic_missile.name: Arcane Magic Missile
spell.spellbladenext.magic_missile.descr: Fires a volley of arcane bolts, dealing {damage} arcane spell damage. You can decide your targets, the longer you hold the charge the more darts you fire.
spell.spellbladenext.whirlwind_polearm.d: Spin, dealing {damage} holy spell damage dps to nearby enemies. Penalty for hitting multiple enemies. Shift to stop moving.
spell.spellbladenext.multislash.name: Arcane Multislash
spell.spellbladenext.multislash.descript: Slash around you at your location as well as at two locations 2 blocks forward and to each side, dealing {damage} arcane damage per slash.
spell.spellbladenext.flicker_strike.name: Arcane Flickering Magic
spell.spellbladenext.flicker_strike.desc: Teleport to the nearest enemy, striking them repeatedly for {damage} DPS if they are the only enemy nearby. If there are more enemies nearby, you teleport to all of them equally.
